title: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
snippet: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

title: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
snippet: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.

title: Snack giant switches to black and white packaging as Iran war hits ink supplies
snippet: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz has severely disrupted global supplies of energy and petrochemicals.

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
snippet: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
snippet: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
snippet: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?

title: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
snippet: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.

title: How driving test booking is changing for learner drivers
snippet: From 12 May, only learner drivers can book their own tests, not instructors.

title: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
snippet: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.

title: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
snippet: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.

title: UK borrowing costs jump amid uncertainty over PM's future
snippet: The possibility of a change of leadership in the UK has unsettled some investors and sent bond yields higher.

title: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
snippet: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.

title: Snack giant switches to black and white packaging as Iran war hits ink supplies
snippet: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz has severely disrupted global supplies of energy and petrochemicals.

title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
snippet: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.
